name: Ebos Group Limited
analysis: EBO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 53% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$17.2400, stop A$15.5232, target A$19.2000 (1.14:1) — then trail it.
